home.title: How can we help you?
home.subtitle: Start a chat with a representative. Your messages are delivered only to the person you choose.
home.activeSubtitle: Reach your ongoing conversations from here.

gate.title: Portal access required
gate.subtitle: Enter your details; your portal access key (JWT) is generated automatically.
gate.name: Name
gate.secretHint: For demo only; in production the JWT is signed server-side.
gate.error: Could not connect. Please check your details.

sellers.emptyDesc: There are no representatives to show right now. Please try again later.

chat.sendError: Could not send message. Please try again.
chat.threadsEmptyDesc: Pick a representative and send your first message.
chat.messagesEmptyDesc: Send the first message; the representative will reply shortly.
chat.noActiveDesc: Pick a chat from the left to view it, or start a new one.
chat.gateDesc: Connect to the portal to see your chats.

newThread.title: Start a new chat
newThread.defaultMessage: Hi, I need help with something.
newThread.error: Could not start chat. Please try again.

whoami.title: Identity (whoami)
whoami.subtitle: verified JWT claims.
whoami.hint: This token is signed with signing_secret on your backend; TeamsLike only verifies it.
